title: Grilled Trout with Ukrainian Silky Sauce
description: A delicious and healthy trout recipe with a creamy Ukrainian silky sauce, perfect for a summer dinner.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Rinse the trout fillets and pat them dry with paper towels.
Season the trout with salt and black pepper.
Brush the grill with olive oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the trout for 4-5 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, heat the silky sauce in a saucepan over low heat.
Serve the grilled trout with the silky sauce spooned over the top.
Garnish with lemon wedges and serve immediately.
